query: SELECT i.id, i.current_hp, i.status, i.catalog_id, c.base_hp, c.level, c.name as cat_name FROM roaming_boss_instances i LEFT JOIN roaming_boss_catalog c ON i.catalog_id = c.id LIMIT 10;
